programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: A Gift for Molly // Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: It's Mudder's Day-everyone's favourite day of the year! The Stunt Park is filled with mud, and the whole town gets to drive through it. But Rev can't join them until he gets a gift for his Mom...and the stores are all closed for the festivities! // After Bo shows off his action-hero moves, Rev wants him to star in his film. Bu Bo freezes with stage fright as soon as Rev turns the camera on! Bo wants to be brave and come through for his friends, but how can he overcome his fear?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! Can Rumble use Bentley's instincts to help them track down their puppy pal? // A big winter storm is headed for town...and it's Christmas Eve! What if Santa can't find them through the snow? Rev and the kids round up their own toys and deliver them to all the kids in town-just in case! But can they make it through the storm?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Kids Planet
programme.desc: Wow, I Never Knew That! is a whimsical, half-hour television series that is jam-packed.

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: Robocar POLI - Trust your friends & Helly's Birthday: On the day with a lot of lightening one of wheels in the Mr. Wheelers store is stolen. As Poli detects this case everyone is getting not to trust each other. Is it really true Brooms town has a thief?

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.desc: Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel! Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus other great games!

programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: LMN's
programme.desc: LMN's - Underwater: Accidentally, Chip and his friends fall into a lake where they are collected by the spacecraft of a sodium atom that carries them to Sodia, an underwater city. There, the atoms of sodium and chlorine live a long conflict. The chlorine wants to join to sodium to form molecules of sodium chloride while sodium atoms prefer to remain. The patrol antimatter comes into contact with chlorine and propose them to provide rifles to dominate the sodium and so force them to molecularized, but Chip makes a fool of the antimatter and makes the chlorine and sodium are no longer enemies and prevails the peace in the underwater world.

programme.title: LMN's
programme.desc: LMN's - The storm: Inside an old wind mill in the midst of a severe storm, Chip and his friends expect it to pass and continue their way. Outside, under the stormy air, the patrol antimatter communicate to Dr. No that they have already found the boy. The evil scientist is confident that this time they will not fail. But when the wind stops, Chip devises a strategy and let the antimatter locked in the mill, as he and the atoms move on.

programme.title: Caso cerrado

programme.title: Vencer el pasado

programme.title: Vencer el pasado

programme.title: Tres veces Ana

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Valentín le pide a Ana Laura que sea su novia, la besa y Ramiro los ve desde lejos. Remedios le dice a Ana Lucía que acepte el trabajo con Aníbal. Iñaki invita a Santiago a su departamento y le dice que cree que ya ha estado ahí.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ana Leticia trata de seducir a Ramiro, pero le da una cachetada frente a Mariano. Iñaki le dice a Santiago los nombres de quienes alquilaban su departamento.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos
programme.desc: Alejandro trata de acercarse a Mili, pero dolida lo rechaza diciéndole que lo odia. Bobby y Rocky encuentran a la esposa de Sergio y Valeria detiene la boda. Luciana descubre que Mili es la hija de Constancio.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos
programme.desc: Luciana trata de hacer quedar mal a Mili frente a Constancio, pero Braulio arruina su plan. Mili escucha a Andrea confesarle a Damián que nunca estuvo embarazada. Andrea pone a Alejandro en contra de Mili y no le cree nada sobre el falso embarazo.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos
programme.desc: Alejandro comienza a dudar de Andrea y la cuestiona sobre el bebé que perdió. En un centro comercial, una mujer distrae a Rocky mientras unos hombres secuestran a Valeria. Damián finge ayudar a Constancio con el rescate de Valeria.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Furioso, Manuel entra en la habitación de Matilde y la abofetea le dice que se la llevará porque pagó las deudas de su familia y salvó a su padre de morir en la vergüenza.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo le dice a Delfino que el padre de Manuel es uno de los hombres más ricos del país, pero que eso no lo detendrá para quitarle a Matilde. Prudencia le dice a Augusta que está escribiendo una carta a Matilde para saber si la puede visitar.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Rosario se sorprende al ver a Manuel. El padre Urbano le pide que le de trabajo a Rosario y Matilde intercede para que la deje a su servicio. El padre Urbano le aconseja a Manuel aceptar su error y comprender los errores de Matilde.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que su matrimonio es un fracaso y le ruega que la deje regresar con sus padres, asegurándole que no buscará a Adolfo. Manuel le recuerda a Matilde que le juró amarlo hasta la muerte y darle un hijo, pero aún no ha cumplido con nada.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo se presenta con Manuel como Felipe Santamaría, el nuevo administrador. Manuel le dice a Matilde que invitó al administrador a comer y que le gustaría presentárselo.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido no logra conseguir trabajo y tiene tres meses de renta atrasados. Martina piensa cómo conseguir dinero para pagar la escuela. Plácido se disfraza de pordiosero para conseguir dinero el dinero de la renta.

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre

programme.sub-title: Los dichos de los viejitos, son evangelios chiquitos

programme.sub-title: Más vale poco y bueno, que mucho y malo
programme.desc: La pobre de María padece una grave enfermedad. Sin embargo, en su corazón no existe lugar para el dolor.

programme.sub-title: Ama a quien no te ama, responde a quien no te llama, y andarás carrera vana
programme.desc: Isa es una adolescente que está dispuesta a todo por amor, incluso a someterse al abuso y a la humillación. Ella se enamora de Gabriel, un chico irresponsable y grosero que la utiliza solo para que le haga sus trabajos de escuela.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Desesperados por encontrar una cura para la terrible enfermedad de su hija, una pareja aceptó ser parte de un experimento y arriesgarse a las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La muerte de la soldado Vanessa Guillén ha provocado un movimiento nacional para hablar sobre un tema incómodo, la violencia sexual contra las mujeres en las fuerzas armadas dutrante años, los abusos contra ellas han sido una epidemia sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Juan Morales, cansado de estar confinado en una silla de ruedas, decidió desafiar sus límites y se convirtió en el distribuidor de drogas de su escuela. Envuelto en la violencia callejera, Juan logró salir adelante para volverse un psicólogo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tiempo parece moverse en cámara lenta para familiares, amigos y conocidos de personas que han sido víctimas de diferentes crímenes que, desgraciadamente, muchas veces no logran ser resueltos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Poco a poco el ser humano termina con el planeta que habita, hoy, el plástico es uno de los mayores enemigos, no se degrada, no desaparece y ahora llena los mares, amenazando su flora y fauna sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Ante la incompetencia de las autoridades, muchos familiares se han convertido en investigadores privados aficionados dispuestos a enfrentar riesgos. Ellos dicen vivir una carrera contra el tiempo para evitar que sus seres queridos desaparezcan.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una banda de asaltantes con armas de juguete se llevó casi veinte millones de dólares de las cajillas de seguridad de un banco, lo sorprendente es que no hubo heridos ni disparos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un hombre habla sobre el infierno que vivió con la desaparición de su esposa, pues no solo sufría por ella al no saber donde estaba, también tuvo que lidiar con el hecho de que se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un programa de reconocida trayectoria, en el que se presentan especiales de reportajes de investigaciones periodísticas de temas de actualidad, de vanguardia, de opinión pública y de problemáticas sociales, este además tiene su faceta ligera y algunas veces incluye episodios con entrevistas exclusivas de los famosos y personajes que están haciendo noticia. El show despliega un panorama actual de los hechos más importantes del mundo y especialmente de las comunidades iberoamericanas, realizado por un grupo de periodistas reconocidos e importantes, cuyos trabajos profesionales han sido amplios, ellos tienen años de experiencia en el área del periodismo y son muy profesionales a la hora de presentar sus reportajes, teniendo en cuenta siempre la responsabilidad que tienen ante el público.

programme.title: Enamorados En Ibiza
programme.desc: En Ibiza, donde los casi cincuenta quieren tener treinta y los treintañeros veinte, cuatro parejas enfrentan el amor, la edad y la búsqueda de sueños ya perdidos. Una comedia ligera sobre reencontrarse con uno mismo.

programme.title: Hecho En Italia
programme.desc: El artista bohemio Robert viaja a Italia con su distanciado hijo Jack para vender una villa heredada. Al renovarla, padre e hijo enfrentan su dolor y comienzan a sanar su relación en medio de los paisajes de la Toscana.

programme.title: Matar A Kane
programme.desc: Un hombre se siente impulsado a vengarse cuando su esposa e hijos son asesinados a manos de una banda despiadada. Dado por muerto y sin nadie a quien recurrir, sale a las calles en busca de justicia y toma el asunto en sus manos.

programme.title: Bobby McFerrin
programme.desc: Estival Jazz Lugano is an annual, open-air music festival that takes place over five days in the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. In 1985, American vocal virtuoso Bobby McFerrin took the stage solo at Estival Jazz Lugano. The one-man musical force stunned the audience with his unique vocal percussion as he delved into the crowd for this quirky and charming act.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: China Moses, Joe Armon Jones & Luke Wynter
programme.sub-title: China Moses: 'Whatever' at Jazz à Ramatuelle
programme.desc: In 1988, Dee Dee Bridgewater was one of the first great jazz singers to perform at the Jazz Festival in Ramatuelle. In 2016, the story seems to repeat itself as her daughter China Moses took the stage at Ramatuelle. Over the years, China Moses has become a mature performer with a unique style: rocky voice, sharp sense of swing, and intense/energetic stage presence. After signing compilations dedicated to Dinah Washington and blues, Moses released in 2016 an album of his own compositions, entitled "Whatever". Get ready for a most entertaining performance combining jazz, soul, and hip-hop.

programme.title: Yumi Ito
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Ron Carter
programme.desc: Ron Carter, Bobby Hutcherson and Joe Chambers are legends of Blue Note Records. They have established themselves as forward-thinking and inventive band leaders, composers and studio musicians, astonishing audiences around the world with their creativity and technical versatility.

programme.title: Earl Hines
programme.desc: Despite his advanced age, the legendary jazz pianist Earl Hines was at the top of his game when he performed in the Belgian town of Spa in 1977. With a band consisting of Rudy Rutherford (reeds), Jimmy Leary (bass), and Eddie Graham (drums), Hines livens up the room with his interpretations of “I Can't Believe That You're In Love With Me” and “The Man I Love.” Marva Josie joins the group for soulful renditions of “A Sunday Kind of Love” and the well-known classic “Kansas City” before the set comes to a close with “Caravan,” which features a lengthy drum solo by Graham.

programme.title: Aki Rissanen, Antti Lotjonen & Teppo Mäkynen
programme.sub-title: Aki Rissanen Trio at Jazzclub Unterfahrt, Munich
programme.desc: Aki Rissanen's interest in jazz came after he started taking classical piano lessons. His deep interest in improvised music placed him among top jazz pianist in his home country - Finland. While composing and performing his own music, Rissanen has also collaborated with Verneri Pohjola and Dave Liebman, and today his name appears among the top European jazz musicians. Live from 'Jazzclub Unterfahrt' in Munich, Germany, together with Antti Lotjonen on bass and Teppo Makynen on drums, Rissanen showcases the best of Scandinavian jazz and its DNA - the Nordic Tone.

programme.title: Lesley Garrett, Wiener Akademie, Alfred Eschwe & David Charles Abell
programme.desc: A Night in Vienna recreates the magical atmosphere of 19th century Viennese ballrooms. In the breathtaking surroundings of Vienna's Hofburg Palace, the Wiener Akademie period orchestra, conducted by Alfred Eschwe, plays some of the Strauss family's and Joseph Lanner's favorite pieces, including "The Beautiful Blue Danube", "Tritsch-Tratsch-Polka", and the "Radetzky March". Former residence of the Habsburg dynasty, the Hofburg contained the apartments of Emperor Franz Joseph and Empress Elizabeth. A Night in Vienna features soloist Lesley Garrett, the most popular soprano from the UK. The spirit of the Strauss era is perfectly recreated by the addition of waltz dancers adorned with historical costumes. This concert was presented in 2004, under the direction of David Amphlett.

programme.title: Glass Marcano, Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours & Stéphanie-Marie Degand
programme.sub-title: Beethoven Violin Concerto & Bizet Symphony in C
programme.desc: Young Venezuelan conductor Glass Marcano is a rising star. Having played in various local youth and symphony orchestras as a violinist, her first experience conducting an ensemble followed in 2012. In September 2020, she won the Orchestra Prize at La Maestra Competition – the first orchestra direction contest for women – held in Paris. In this concert, recorded at Opéra de Tours in February 2021, Marcano leads the Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours in performances of two Romantic masterpieces. The program opens with Ludwig van Beethoven's Violin Concerto in D major, Op. 61, featuring Stéphanie-Marie Degand as the soloist. This piece is one of the most important works in its genre. The program concludes with Georges Bizet's 1855 Symphony in C major, written when the composer was only 17 years old.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances present Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 73. Whereas it took the composer over a decade to complete his first symphony, he penned his Symphony No. 2 in just a few months, during his summer sojourn in the restful Austrian village of Pörtschach in 1877. Nicknamed his ‘Pastoral' symphony, the work is arguably the most sunny and optimistic of Brahms's four symphonies. Lyrical in character, it features joyful melodies. This performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Renaud Capuçon, Gerard Causse, Iddo Bar-Shai & Jean-Jacques Kantorow
programme.sub-title: Chamber music by Mozart and Shostakovich
programme.desc: French violinist Renaud Capuçon appears at the festival Les Coups de Cœur de Chantilly, presenting a chamber music program consisting of classical and 20th century repertoire. He performs with the soloists of the International Menuhin Music Academy led by French conductor Jean-Jacques Kantorow. First on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Sinfonia Concertante in E-flat major, K. 364, in which Capuçon and violist Gérard Caussé appear as the soloists. Capuçon is then joined by pianist Iddo Bar-Shaï for a performance of Mozart's Sonata for violin and piano in E minor, K. 304. The program closes with Dmitri Shostakovich's Chamber Symphony in C minor, Op. 110a, which is a transcription of Shostakovich's String Quartet No. 8 by Russian conductor Rudolf Barshai, the composer's close friend. This performance was recorded at Château de Chantilly, on May 15, 2021.

programme.title: Carlos Miguel Prieto & Orquesta Sinfónica de Minería
programme.desc: Mahler's Symphony No. 8, also known as the "Symphony of a Thousand," is a monumental choral epic composed in 1906 that requires an enormous ensemble of soloists, choruses, and a massive orchestra to perform its vast musical tapestry. The work is a unique and grandiose tribute to love and the spiritual salvation of mankind, drawing from two distinct textual sources to create its sublime effect. Audiences most value its overwhelming, ecstatic emotional power and the sheer spectacle of the grand performing forces.

programme.title: Green Day
programme.desc: Live concert of legendary punk-rock band Green Day on April 14, 2009, performing the whole of their imminent new album, "21st Century Breakdown", at the Fox Theater in the band's hometown, Oakland, California.

programme.title: The Offspring
programme.desc: The Offspring is an American rock band from Garden Grove, California, formed in 1984. Originally formed under the name Manic Subsidal, the band's lineup consists of lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist Bryan "Dexter" Holland, bassist Todd Morse and lead guitarist Kevin "Noodles" Wasserman.

programme.title: Billy Talent
programme.sub-title: Live At Festival Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring (Nürburgring), Rock Im Park (Nuremberg) is a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in western Germany. Featuring Billy Talent.

programme.title: AC/DC
programme.desc: Filmed at the world famous Circus Krone in Munich, this AC/DC concert from June 17, 2003 features standout performances of "Rock N Roll Damnation" and "What's Next To The Moon" and more.

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood
programme.sub-title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood - Live from MSG
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out three-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in late February 2008 when icons Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their all-too-brief days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969. Whether they will ever team again is unknown. But with Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood Live From Madison Square Garden fans everywhere are able to experience the sound and the glory of a performance on that famous stage by two of rock's greatest artists.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.
